_README: Packed land/water bitmap, row 0 = lat 90..89.75 N, col 0 = lng -180...-179.75, bit index row*w+col, MSB-first per byte, base64. Rasterized from Natural Earth 1:50m land polygons (public domain) by tools/build_land_grid.py — regenerate with that script, don't hand-edit. Land-biased on coasts: cells touched by any coastline vertex count as land, so the sea-gap check only fires on genuinely open water.
